page_metadata.biotools__summary: Quasar is an open source project, a collection of data analysis toolboxes extending the Orange suite. We empower researchers from a variety of fields to gain better insight to their data through interactive data visualization, powerful machine learning methods and combining different datasets in easy to understand visual workflows.
